The text on the right lists 'Race Callers: Paul Jenes OAM, Tom Nickson', 'Narration: Tom Nickson', and 'Production: David Armstrong'.
The copyright text at the bottom reads 'copyright Athletics Victoria 2010'.

spatial: The white square box containing the logo is to the left of the white credit text. The yellow copyright text is below both the white box and the credit text.
